  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/pipeline/programInfo/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}

</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get pipeline program info by pipelineId

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

  parameters={[{"name":"pipelineId","in":"path","description":"PipelineId for which you need program info for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns a pipeline program info if the operation was successful","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"404":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND if the Program info for the specified pipelineId does not exist","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR if there was some other error that did not allow the operation to complete","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
